session.user: Run pytest on the test file and report results. Command: pytest tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_dispatch_helpers.py -xvs
session.assistant: I'll run pytest on the specified test file and report results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on dispatch_helpers test file

session.tool_result:
